title: athyrium pubicostatum
intro: Athyrium pubicostatum, also known as the creeping lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is primarily found in the Himalayan region, where it grows in moist and shaded areas. Traditionally, Athyrium pubicostatum has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, or dried and powdered to be consumed as a supplement, offering potential health benefits such as improved digestion and enhanced overall well-being.
